data.body: Investigation conclusion: Code is correct. Skill eval failures do NOT set STATUS to 'failed' (verified — lines 718-728 only emit WARNING, STATUS is never modified). The commit block the reporter observed was caused by unit test failures (STATUS set on lines 578-685), not skill eval failures. The WARNING message about skill eval failure coincided with the unit test failure, creating an attribution error. Recommend closing as 'working as designed' or improving the STATUS output message to include the cause.
